svg.text: AI / LLM Engineer • Bengaluru, India • +91 7975657928 • nareshlahajal@gmail.com

g.text: Professional Experience
RAMSOFT – AI / LLM Engineer Intern
June 2025 – Dec 2025
Architected LLM automation agent using Claude for large-scale Cypress-to-Playwright migration.
• Reduced manual engineering effort by 30–40%.
Fine-tuned OpenAI Whisper for domain-specific medical transcription via supervised retraining.
Designed sub-1.2s E2E low-latency inference pipelines balancing accuracy and efficiency.
Built scalable Python data ingestion pipelines with SonarQube-verified code quality.
GENPACT – Generative AI Engineer Intern
Feb 2024 – July 2024
Designed RAG systems using LangChain, embedding models, and vector similarity search.
Implemented LLM orchestration integrating OpenAI and Mistral models with tool augmentation.
Developed AI PoCs for intelligent document understanding and semantic search workflows.
Key Projects
TrueLarge-RT (Large-Scale LLM Edge Inference Research)
Research on 70B parameter LLM inference on Android using GGUF and mmap loading.
Tech: Kotlin, C++, GGUF, Quantization, Edge AI
EdgeMind (On-Device Agentic RAG Assistant)
Engineered local RAG with NL control for Bluetooth, Settings, and System Actions.
Tech: Kotlin, Android Studio, HuggingFace, On-Device LLM
Multimodal InsightFusion (Vision-Language RAG)
Built cross-modal retrieval system integrating OpenCLIP with Mistral LLM.
Technical Expertise

Generative AI: LLMs, RAG, Prompt Eng, Fine-Tuning, Multimodal AI Engineering: Quantization (GGUF), Semantic Search, Vector DBs, Model Opt Languages: Python, C++, Java, Kotlin, SQL, Shell, LangChain, HuggingFace Tools: LangGraph, Git, Docker, Postman, VS Code, SonarQube
Education & Credentials
BMS College of Engineering, Bangalore
Bachelor of Engineering in Information Science (2025) | CGPA: 7.7
PUBLICATIONS & CERTIFICATIONS

text.tspan: • arXiv: 2401.13613 - Study on Photo Search using CLIP Model.
• IBM Python for Data Science | Udemy Machine & Deep Learning.
